text_block_list.name: A Certain Racer
text_block_list.text: It started with playing tag against my sister.

text_block_list.name: A Certain Racer
text_block_list.text:
Just meaningless running with my sister... It was
nothing more than that.

text_block_list.name: A Certain Racer
text_block_list.text:
All I did was chase her—like a happy, excited
little monster.

text_block_list.name: A Certain Racer
text_block_list.text:
Just moving my legs, filling my lungs with air, then
moving my legs again—

text_block_list.name: A Certain Racer
text_block_list.text: That was how I breathed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
After a while, my sister wasn't there for me to
chase anymore.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I was alone.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But even by myself, I remembered exactly how I
breathed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Then it clicked—my thirst is born of my breathing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The harder I breathe, the thirstier I become and
the less satisfied I am.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But I can't stop breathing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Even if every breath I drew were painful, I'd have
to continue doing it in order to live.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But what if... what if my body...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What if it one day rejects my breath? Should such
a day come...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What am I supposed to do then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch! I can't... lose!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She's... still running, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Mayano isn't my only opponent in the
Arima. I'm going to beat her too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, I don't know about you, Hishiama, but
Mayano's next race is the Takarazuka Kinen. She
has to get some proper rest. Right, Mayano?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Are you listening, Mayano? Hey!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...I've got it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Mayano?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It... can't be true...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: There's just no way!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Mayano?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I realized something.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Look at how brightly the sun is twinkling right
now—and yet it's setting.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If I don't hurry, it'll set. Then I won't be able to
reach it anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I won't get my chance to run with it!
choice_data_list: Are you talking about Narita Brian?
Are you talking about Narita Brian?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That obvious, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I thought about everything that's happened up
until now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: She just wanted to be excited.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
She just wanted to run with all her might and say,
"That was fun."

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
She's been fighting for so long, hoping that she'd
one day be able to say that.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Even if it meant dragging along a body that
wouldn't respond to her desire to twinkle.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer! I don't wanna back down like this!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If the Arima Kinen is really going to be her last
race...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Then I wanna beat her on that day as Mayano
Top Gun. I wanna smile and say...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
When I run with everything I've got, I'm faster
than you running with everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And that's got you totally excited, hasn't it?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yep! I'm gonna do it—just you wait and see!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get stronger at the Takarazuka Kinen,
and faster at the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And then at the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If I beat her...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I want you to look at me—and me alone—and say,
"You twinkled brighter than anyone else."
